title: AEDC RNA reference fasta files for Ambystoma mexicanum
author: Sachslehner, Attila
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This fasta file contains the manually added aedc genes of the Axolotl and can be used as reference for RNA read quantification.
steps_raw: This fasta file contains the manually added aedc genes of the Axolotl and can be used as reference for RNA read quantification.
